creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Jul 22, 2006 at 09:37:02AM +0200, koutek@o-k.cz wrote:

Please send the file generated by

diff -ruN campsite.orig campsite

The one you provided is hard to apply.

Regads,
Rong-En Fan
